name: cost-guard
description: Real-time token-cost budget enforcement for Claude Code. Halts runaway turns mid-loop before they burn through your 5-hour slot.

enabled.title: Enable cost-guard halting
enabled.description: Master switch. When off, no halts fire (ledger still records).

max_usd_per_session.title: Per-session cost cap (USD)
max_usd_per_session.description: Halt new work when this session's total spend reaches this value. Primary defense against a session burning too much over time.

max_usd_per_step.title: Per-step cost cap (USD)
max_usd_per_step.description: Halt the agentic loop after one Claude step (one user prompt → Claude's tool calls + final answer) has spent this many dollars. Primary defense against a single greedy step.

rate_per_min_usd.title: Burn-rate limit (USD/min)
rate_per_min_usd.description: Halt mid-step when the trailing 5-minute session burn rate exceeds this value.

max_subagent_spawns_per_step.title: Max subagent spawns per step
max_subagent_spawns_per_step.description: Deny further Agent/Task tool calls within one step once this count is reached. Bounds fan-out cost.

warn_at_usd.title: Per-session warning threshold (USD)
warn_at_usd.description: Emit an amber warning on UserPromptSubmit when session spend crosses this dollar amount (always below max_usd_per_session).

seed_from_history.title: Seed ledger from existing transcripts on first run
seed_from_history.description: On first install, scan recent ~/.claude/projects transcripts to populate the rolling cost ledger. Gives accurate trailing rates on the first prompt.

log_decisions.title: Log halt decisions
log_decisions.description: Write an audit line to halt-log.jsonl for every halt/warn decision. Useful for diagnosing false positives.
